name: Amazing Corn Bread
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Skim milk (I used soy milk)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Grease a pan (Chris used a medium-sized pot sprayed lightly with Pam; I used a 9-inch square glass pyrex pan) and put it in the oven to preheat.
3. Mix all ingredients.
4. Pour batter into heated pan.
5. Bake for 20 minutes.
